text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In front of Reporter Otonashi and the rest of the
media, Director Akikawa announces the creation
of a new race: the URA Finale!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to enter, my trainee has to become a star
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Can we claim the honor of being the first Finale
Champion?
